blocked_reason: Gas leak detected. Do NOT attempt any repair. Evacuate the area immediately and call emergency services.
warnings: Do NOT use any electrical switches, lights, or appliances — a spark could ignite the gas.
Do NOT attempt to locate or fix the leak yourself.
Leave doors open as you exit to help ventilate.
Do not re-enter until cleared by emergency services or your gas provider.
emergency_action: Leave immediately. Call 911 (US) or your local gas emergency line from outside. Do not use your phone inside the building.
